event.description: The `sandbox` attribute of an `iframe` is not set in HTML. This iframe loads content from a third-party site. If the JavaScript in that iframe is malicious or was compromised, an attacker can break out of the iframe, access the DOM of the main page, and mount a clickjacking or a phishing attack.

Enable all restrictions by setting the `sandbox` attribute of the `iframe` to an empty value, or just allow necessary capabilities by setting the `sandbox` attribute with specific value(`allow-forms`, `allow-modals`, `allow-scripts`, etc.). Avoid setting both `allow-scripts` and `allow-same-origin` at the same time as they are a vulnerable attributes combination.

error.extra: missing_iframe_sandbox_html -- views/tutorial/a4.html -- ##Σ-markup - div - div - div - div - p - iframe

typePropertiesGroup.longDescription: The `sandbox` attribute of an `iframe` is not set in HTML. This iframe loads content from a third-party site. If the JavaScript in that iframe is malicious or was compromised, an attacker can break out of the iframe, access the DOM of the main page, and mount a clickjacking or a phishing attack.

event.description: The `sandbox` attribute of an `iframe` is not set in HTML. This iframe loads content from a third-party site. If the JavaScript in that iframe is malicious or was compromised, an attacker can break out of the iframe, access the DOM of the main page, and mount a clickjacking or a phishing attack.

Enable all restrictions by setting the `sandbox` attribute of the `iframe` to an empty value, or just allow necessary capabilities by setting the `sandbox` attribute with specific value(`allow-forms`, `allow-modals`, `allow-scripts`, etc.). Avoid setting both `allow-scripts` and `allow-same-origin` at the same time as they are a vulnerable attributes combination.
